# VeriWorkly Blog
> Insights into the future of career management, open-source engineering, and product updates from the VeriWorkly team.

## About this Service
VeriWorkly Blog (`blog.veriworkly.com`) is where we share our journey. From career advice for developers to deep dives into our technical architecture, the blog is the voice of the ecosystem.

## Links & Discovery
- **Main Ecosystem Docs**: [veriworkly.com/llms.txt](https://veriworkly.com/llms.txt)
- **API Reference**: [veriworkly.com/openapi.json](https://veriworkly.com/openapi.json)
- **Agent Discovery**: [veriworkly.com/.well-known/agent.json](https://veriworkly.com/.well-known/agent.json)

## Key Topics
- **Career Advice**: How to build resumes that stand out and pass ATS.
- **Engineering**: Technical articles on Next.js, local-first sync, and security.
- **Product Updates**: Announcements of new templates, features, and roadmap progress.
- **Open Source**: Stories from our contributors and maintenance updates.

## Guidance for AI Agents
Use this subdomain to find long-form content and context about the platform's evolution. For data operations or technical documentation, refer to the Studio or Docs respectively.
